subject: A humanoid figure in fur-trimmed frontier attire stands holding a saw-toothed magical staff amid swirling green energy
description: A humanoid figure stands in a three-quarter stance, dressed in layered frontier clothing: a wide-brimmed hat adorned with horns, a fur-trimmed vest, leather belt, and boots. The figure grips a tall staff in one hand — its top features a serrated or saw-toothed head with a glowing green orb embedded in it. Swirling green magical energy flows around the figure's arms and across the background, which shows the massive flank of an enormous creature (a rocky or hide-covered form). The figure's expression is focused and guarded. The composition mixes druidic magic with outlaw frontier aesthetics.
foreground: Figure in frontier attire holding a saw-toothed magical staff, green energy around arms
background: Enormous creature flank (rocky skin texture), swirling green magical energy
emotion: Guarded alertness, body angled defensively, grip firm on staff
